back_translation: The wall is white. The sculptures are on the wall. The sculptures depict animals. The sculptures are wooden.
target_caption: Satë i ku̱a̱ki yö'tso ulù klö wa.I ki̱ idiö́köl târule è̱ë E̱na̱ mè̱ wa.

predicted_caption: Shkíshkî ar. Shkíshkî butûtû. Yë́jkuö tso' shkíshkî ki̱. Yë́jkuö tö íyi shtö̀k. Íyi sarûrû. Yë́jkuö tso' shkíshkî ki̱. Íyiwak tso' shkíshkî ki̱.
english_intermediate:
A banner hangs.
The banner is white.
A drawing is on the banner.
The drawing depicts a figure.
The figure is yellow.
Text is on the banner.
Animals are on the banner.
back_translation: The background hangs. The background is white. A drawing is on the background. The drawing depicts a figure. The figure is yellow. The text is on the background. Animals are in the background.
target_caption: Datsi’ tak wö̀a sarûrû, i kí̱ka íyi diö́köl wanyö’tso wè̱s: tkabë̀, sàl, ók, na̱mù̱ e̱na̱ tsawì.

predicted_caption: Wë́mpa dur. Wë́mpa tö kàl kṍpa tsók. Wë́mpa tö kalö̀io apàio tã'. Kàl tso' shkíshkî a̱.
english_intermediate:
Three men stand.
The men hold spears.
The men wear pants.
Trees are in the background.
back_translation: The men stand. The men hold spears. The men wear pants. The trees are in the background.
target_caption: Ie'pa bák se' shkë́ki ie, Wö́su̱k ie'pa e̱' chö tö irir ká̱ bulu' e̱na̱ ie'pa wö̀ki kò̱s íyi tso' e' wë́rke . Ká̱ i̱â̱i̱â̱ ie'pa bák sè̱nu̱k ká̱ i' ki̱.

predicted_caption: Pë'pa tso' kapéblo a̱. Pë'pa tö apàio apàio tã'. Ù tso' shkíshkî a̱.
english_intermediate:
People dance in a town.
People wear clothes.
Buildings are in the background.
back_translation: People are in the town. People wear clothing. The buildings are in the background.
target_caption: Ta̱î̱ pë’ dapàna̱ ká̱ kibí a̱ íyi ujtéchök. Ie’pa a̱ñì̱ wö̀ie i ká̱ ujtéchök.

predicted_caption: Ù tso' ká̱ ĩ́s ki̱. Kàl tso' shkíshkî a̱. Ù tã́ĩ.
english_intermediate:
A house stands on grass.
Trees are in the background.
The house is big.
back_translation: The house is on the grass. The trees are in the background. The house is big.
target_caption: Ù sulë pámi̱k ta̱î̱ ká̱ wë́rke tsipátsipa, wö́su̱k ká̱ í̱te̱ idir.

predicted_caption: Wë́m dur. Ù wa̱ ù wö́kir tso'. Kàl tso' shkíshkî a̱.
english_intermediate:
A man stands outdoors.
A building has a roof.
Trees are in the background.
back_translation: The man stands. The building has a roof. The trees are in the background.
target_caption: Ù wë́rke bë̂rie élwe. Êköl wë́m yë̂âr ù wö́su̱k. Ie’ kalö̀io dalôlô, pàio sarûrû.
